name: Player List Item
desc: Adds/updates/removes entries from the tab player list.

fields.name: players
fields.desc: List of player info entries with UUID, name, properties, gamemode, ping, display name

notes: Action ADD_PLAYER (0) sends the full player info. REMOVE_PLAYER (4) only sends the UUID. UPDATE_LATENCY (2) sends UUID and ping.

implementation.overview: Tab list update (add/remove/update player). Modules: TabGUI, NameProtect, AntiBot (verify real players).

modules.name: TabGUI
modules.purpose: Track tab list for display and bot filtering.
